groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #0.

sentences.text: The children at the air show climbed onto the parked tank and pretended to be soldiers.
The children at the air show climbed onto the parked tank and pretended to be soldiers. Sandbags and razor wire surrounded the tank that served as a checkpoint along the main road.

The children at the air show climbed onto the parked tank and pretended to be soldiers. Sandbags and razor wire surrounded the tank that served as a checkpoint along the main road. The photographer captured a striking image of a lone tank silhouetted against the orange desert sunset.

The kids at the history fair built an impressive cardboard replica of a famous World War Two tank.

During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive. A bristlenose pleco attached itself to the glass near the top of the tank and refused to move. The filtration system hummed quietly behind the tank while the fish settled in for the night. I spent way too much money on new plants for the tank but they look so good. The dentist's office featured a tall hexagonal tank filled with exotic lionfish and pufferfish. The automatic feeder dispensed a pinch of flake food into the tank at precisely eight each morning. Calcium reactors help maintain alkalinity and calcium levels required by stony corals in a reef tank. Bright neon tetras darted between the plastic plants anchored along the bottom of the tank.
